name: intellij-styled-search
description: IntelliJ IDEA style project search — peek-like movable panel with workspace file results

commands.title: Diagnose Active File in Search Index

intellijStyledSearch.engine.markdownDescription: Search engine to use. `zoekt` runs the Rust local shard/mmap engine with automatic codesearch fallback when the runtime is unavailable or still warming up. `codesearch` uses the existing TypeScript planner plus ripgrep verifier.

intellijStyledSearch.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns to exclude from search.

intellijStyledSearch.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size (bytes) to include in search.

intellijStyledSearch.maxResults.description: How many match lines to load per batch. Scrolling near the bottom loads the next batch. Values at or below 0 fall back to the built-in default.

intellijStyledSearch.searchHistoryLimit.description: Maximum number of executed search queries to keep in the search history dropdown. Set to 0 to disable storing search history.

intellijStyledSearch.disableMonacoCaptur.description: Disable Monaco capture/prototype probing for search previews. Enabled by default to avoid CDP and renderer prototype hooks affecting VS Code UI responsiveness.

intellijStyledSearch.closeMainInspectorA.description: Close VS Code's shared main-process inspector after Search UI work. Enabled by default to keep the VS Code renderer responsive after CDP-based UI injection.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererPerfDiagnos.description: Enable verbose renderer performance tracing for Search UI diagnosis. Disabled by default because the observers and trace bridge add renderer work.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererSafetyDiagn.description: Enable Search UI renderer safety snapshots in the output log. Disabled by default because each snapshot evaluates JavaScript in the VS Code renderer.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererInlayClickH.description: Enable the legacy renderer-level document click hook for call graph inlay hints. Disabled by default so hidden Search UI state leaves no global renderer input hook; VS Code native inlay hint commands remain available.

intellijStyledSearch.disposeRendererPatc.description: Fully dispose the injected Search UI renderer patch when the panel is hidden. Enabled by default to release renderer listeners and observers after each search session.

intellijStyledSearch.keepCdpOpenWhileSea.description: Keep the CDP bridge open while the Search UI panel is visible. Enabled by default to avoid repeated SIGUSR1/inspector reconnects during typing and incremental searches; cleanup still runs when the panel is hidden.

intellijStyledSearch.suspendIntelliSense.description: Temporarily stop and suppress IntelliSense Recursion renderer capture while the Search UI is visible. This avoids overlapping renderer prototype hooks from slowing VS Code.

intellijStyledSearch.mcpPort.description: Localhost port used by the call graph MCP JSON-RPC endpoint when `Start Call Graph MCP Server` is run. Set to 0 to let the OS choose a free port.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphConcurrenc.description: Maximum number of source files parsed concurrently when rebuilding the call graph. Set to 0 to auto-size from system parallelism, capped at 32.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphInlayHints.description: Show call graph relation links as inlay hints next to symbols. By default this surfaces callers, usages, and implementations.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphShowCallee.description: Also show callees in call graph inlay hints. Disabled by default because callers and usages are usually more useful for code navigation and agent context.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphImplementa.description: Provide Go to Implementation results from the call graph for interface and abstract symbols.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphExcludeGlo.description: Additional glob patterns excluded only from call graph rebuilds.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludePos.description: Materialize ambiguous possible call graph edges. Disabled by default to avoid memory explosions in large repositories.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludeUnr.description: Materialize unresolved, dynamic, and external callsites as one dynamic edge per callsite. This keeps dynamic calls visible without exploding ambiguous possible edges.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxEdges.description: Maximum unique materialized call graph edges stored in memory during a rebuild.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxPossibl.description: Maximum possible target edges per ambiguous call when possible edges are enabled.
